wealth_milestone.title: Wealth Milestone
wealth_milestone.sheet_desc: Nodes on the hypotenuse indicate stage progress; the golden waterline reflects your current asset ratio. Tap the triangle anytime to view details and the next goal.

level_desc.initial_accumulation: Build the habit: make cashflow visible and consistent.
level_desc.steady_growth: Set budget boundaries and reduce impulse spending.
level_desc.well_off_life: Stabilize structure and start long-term allocation with risk awareness.
level_desc.financial_freedom: Goal-driven allocation with compounding and sustainability in mind.

stats_ui.income_radar_hint: Tap a vertex to see guidance for this income source.
stats_ui.empty_desc: Add your first transaction to start your money story
stats_ui.no_expense_desc: No expense data in this period. Add one to see insights
stats_ui.detective_no_expense: 💡 Tip: No expenses in this period yet — add one to unlock insights!
stats_ui.detective_dining: 💡 Tip: Dining took {{pct}}% of {{period}} expenses — delivery might be a bit high.
stats_ui.detective_shopping: 💡 Tip: Shopping is {{pct}}% of {{period}} spend — try a 24h cooling-off rule.
stats_ui.detective_transport: 💡 Tip: Transport is {{pct}}% of {{period}} — compare passes or ride-share deals.
stats_ui.detective_balanced: 💡 Tip: {{period}} looks balanced — top category「{{category}}」is only {{pct}}%. Keep it up!
stats_ui.detective_income_good: 💡 Tip: Positive balance {{balance}} in {{period}} — great pace; consider saving part of it.

saving_challenge.title: Saving Challenge
saving_challenge.subtitle: Green habit · 30-day streak
tips: Well done — you beat impulse spending today.
Steady. You’re getting richer day by day.
Skip one small splurge today, gain confidence tomorrow.
Store the impulse, withdraw the freedom.
Every streak is an asset growing quietly.

sprout.title: Fresh sprout
sprout.subtitle: Day 1 is hardest — and most worth it

seedling.title: Growing seedling
seedling.subtitle: Consistency is reshaping your money habits

sapling.title: Rooted sapling
sapling.subtitle: Your habit is becoming reliable and repeatable

pro.unlock_income_radar: Lifetime unlock: income source radar for structure and suggestions.

income_sources_advice.salary: Prioritize stability: improve core skills and negotiation leverage.
income_sources_advice.investment: Control volatility: diversify and track long-term return vs drawdown.
income_sources_advice.side_hustle: Build scalable income streams with repeatable processes.
income_sources_advice.bonus: Treat bonuses as volatile: allocate more to savings or one-off goals.
income_sources_advice.other_transfer: Label the source to avoid distorting cashflow stats.

edit_budget_desc: Plan your monthly spending wisely for better financial management.
